title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
